title: cyclobalanopsis acuta
intro: Cyclobalanopsis acuta, also known as the Taiwan chinquapin, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis acuta include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Cyclobalanopsis acuta include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and prevent various health conditions.
